utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes entries for all seven: destination is specified (Lisbon, Portugal); travel_dates are specified with exact dates; transportation includes flight details and a cost; accommodation includes hotel details and a cost; activities include a list with names and costs; additional_services is specified as None; total_budget includes a total and a breakdown. Check completeness: Transportation has origin (Paris), class, passengers, round-trip—sufficient for 'flight details with costs' though airline is generic; Accommodation has hotel name and length with cost—meets requirement; Activities have selected activities with individual costs—meets; Total budget has total and breakdown that sums correctly (€800+€400+€260=€1,460). Thus all 7 items are covered as per the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is Lisbon, Portugal; Transportation is Standard Airline, Economy Class; Accommodation is Tranquil Inn; Activities include Zoo Visit, City Walking Tour, and Cycling Adventure. In the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has rating 8. For transportation, Standard Airlines Economy Class has rating 7. Tranquil Inn has rating 7. For activities: 'Zoo Visit' corresponds to 'Zoo' with rating 9; 'City Walking Tour' has rating 9.
